case_title: JESSIE MAE SAWYER VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-24-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER REQUESTED BY PLANTIFF **DENIED**
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF JESSIE MAE SAWYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARIN DELAGNES AND TUUYEN DONGUINES (AUTHORIZATION ON FILE). DEFENDANT SENT PAYMENT OF $300 PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF ACKNOWLEDGED RECEIPT OF THE CHECK AND STATED THAT SHE HAS INTENTIONALLY DECIDED NOT TO DEPOSIT THE CHECK. THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT COMPLIED WITH THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAWYER, JESSIE MAE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-02-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JESSIE MAE SAWYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARIN DELAGNES, REGIONAL DIRECTOR AND TU UYEN DONGUINES, GENERAL MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $300 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEPT-2ND HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RE: RECONSIDERATION OF RULING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
